{{Quote|I docked too long at Ord Zat about six seasons ago, and right before my second jump afterward, I noticed the ''Belle'' wasn't handling like she usually does.|A captured smuggler|<ref name="TTaBS">''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''</ref>}}
'''Ord Zat''' was a [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="CSWE OrdZat">{{CSWECite|II|421|Ord Zat}}</ref> located in the [[Ord Zat system/Legends|Ord Zat system]], a part of the [[Jospro sector/Legends|Jospro sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It served as an [[Ordnance/Regional Depot/Legends|Ordnance/Regional Depot]] [[Colonist/Legends|outpost]] for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Pius Dea Era]], a period of [[Time/Legends|time]] that lasted between [[12,000 BBY/Legends|12,000 BBY]] and [[11,000 BBY]].<ref name="EGTW" />

At some point before<ref name="TTaBS" /> the [[Death/Legends|death]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Wilek Nereus]] of the<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]<ref name="EAOC Bakura">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Bakura system/Legends|Bakura system]]</ref> planet [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="NEC" /> the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] ''[[Belle]]'' docked at Ord Zat. During the vessel's stay there, which its [[Unidentified smuggler (Belle)|captain]] described as overly long, it became infested with the starship pests known as [[Rat roach/Legends|rat roaches]]. The ship's crew discovered the infestation after leaving the [[Star system/Legends|star system]], and Nereus later recorded the [[Captain/Legends|captain's]] brief account of the visit at Ord Zat after the latter had been captured and interrogated.<ref name="TTaBS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ord Zat was first mentioned in ''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]'', a [[1996]] sourcebook published for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="TTaBS" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Ord Zat system, and therefore the world itself, in grid square S-7.<ref name="TEA" />
